Harrow Deck.name: 哈罗牌组 Harrow Deck
Harrow Deck.description:
哈罗是一副类似塔罗牌的牌组，可用于日常生活或任何角色扮演游戏中。无论你在哪里使用它，都要谨慎使用。哈罗牌组充满了力量，因此你必须学会正确解读牌面，否则将遭受不光彩的命运。
Harrow is a tarot-like deck usable in everyday life or in any roleplaying game. Regardless of where you use it, use it with care. A harrow deck is loaded with power, so you must learn to read the cards correctly or else suffer an ignominious fate.

The Avalanche.name: 雪崩 The Avalanche
The Avalanche.description:
雪崩（守序邪恶，敏捷）是灾害。它是一个没有思考、没有理性的东西，会碾压所有挡在它路上的人。它可以代表物理上的灾害，或来自恐慌人群或其他没有思考的团体或实体的灾害。若卡牌失位，这场灾难很可能会被避免，但并非没有代价。
The Avalanche (lawful evil, Dexterity) is disaster. It is an unthinking, unreasoning thing that overruns all who get in its way. It can represent physical disaster or the disaster that comes from a panicked crowd or other unthinking group or entity. If the card is misaligned, the calamity is likely to be averted, though not without consequence.

The Bear.name: 熊 The Bear
The Bear.description:
熊（中立，力量）就是纯粹的力量。人们常常犯的错误是以为熊可以被驯服或受训。当某人相信自己已经控制住熊时，那个人最终会明白自己错得有多离谱。这里或许需要蛮力，但使用它的后果可能会很严重。
The Bear (neutral, Strength) is pure strength. People often make the mistake of thinking The Bear can be tamed or trained. When someone believes they have The Bear under control, that person eventually learns the error of their ways. Brute force might be required here, but the consequences of its use might be severe.

The Beating.name: 搏动 The Beating
The Beating.description:
殴打（中立邪恶，力量）象征从四面八方遭受攻击，但它也可以表示自我——在心智层面——的瓦解。无论这份力量来自肉体还是心智，它都会在无情的攻击下消融。失位时，这张牌暗示在这场袭击之中，会发现未曾察觉的力量。
The Beating (neutral evil, Strength) signifies coming under attack from all sides, but it can also indicate the dissolution of the self—mentally. Whether the strength is of the flesh or the mind, it dissolves under the relentless attack. Misaligned, this card suggests that during the assault, undiscovered strength is found.

The Betrayal.name: 背叛 The Betrayal
The Betrayal.description:
背叛（中立邪恶，魅力）是自私的化身。嫉妒扭曲灵体，并最终导致毁灭。它也可能指一个外表可爱却掩藏着邪恶之心的人。若解读不当，这张牌意味着自我牺牲，或背离物质世界及其诱惑。
The Betrayal (neutral evil, Charisma) is selfishness incarnate. Envy twists the spirit and leads ultimately to devastation. It can also indicate a person whose loveliness hides an evil heart. Misaligned, the card means self-sacrifice or turning away from the material world and its temptations.

The Big Sky.name: 大天空 The Big Sky
The Big Sky.description:
大苍穹（混乱善良，力量）展现了一个史诗般的瞬间：受压迫的囚犯获得解放。囚犯的自由象征着重大而强大的改变，如同旧日镣铐在白昼之光中被抛下。若其失准，那些被抛弃的镣铐可能会被更糟的镣铐所取代。
The Big Sky (chaotic good, Strength) shows an epic moment as downtrodden prisoners are freed. The prisoners’ freedom specifies momentous and powerful change, as old shackles are cast off in the light of day. If it is misaligned, those castoff shackles might be replaced with worse ones.

faces.name: 大天空 The Big Sky
faces.text:
苍穹之下
The Big Sky

The Brass Dwarf.name: 黄铜矮人 The Brass Dwarf
The Brass Dwarf.description:
黄铜矮人（守序中立，体质）展现出一个机械人偶，象征着对当前危险的刀枪不入。即使他人可能倒下，黄铜矮人仍旧健康而强壮。黄铜矮人也可能意味着某人的失败或黑暗命运，而这反过来可能使其周围所有其他人免于更强效的危险。
The Brass Dwarf (lawful neutral, Constitution) shows a mechanical figure who represents invulnerability to a current danger. Although others might fall, The Brass Dwarf remains hale and strong. The Brass Dwarf can also mean a failure or dark fate for one, which in turn might save all others around them from a greater danger.

faces.name: 黄铜矮人 The Brass Dwarf
faces.text:
黄铜矮人
The Brass Dwarf

The Carnival.name: 狂欢节 The Carnival
The Carnival.description:
狂欢节（混乱中立，感知）是幻象与虚假梦境之卡。这张牌可以增强超自然世界的力量，但依赖这种反复无常的力量可能有风险。对其他人而言，这张牌描绘了轻率的计划或不切实际的野心。
The Carnival (chaotic neutral, Wisdom) is the card of illusions and false dreams. This card can heighten the power of the supernatural world, but depending on such whimsical forces can be risky. For others, this card depicts imprudent plans or unrealistic ambitions.

The Courtesan.name: 交际花 The Courtesan
The Courtesan.description:
交际花（混乱中立，魅力）是政治阴谋之牌。面具体现了必须遵循的社交礼仪。若它滑落，谈判可能出现意想不到的转折。这张牌也可能指示一位左右局势的力量人物。如何对待他们将决定局面的结果。
The Courtesan (chaotic neutral, Charisma) is the card of political intrigue. The mask embodies the social niceties that must be followed. If it slips, negotiations can take an unexpected turn. The card can also indicate a figure of power who shapes events. How they are treated decides the outcome of the situation.

The Cricket.name: 蟋蟀 The Cricket
The Cricket.description:
蟋蟀（中立善良，敏捷）代表一种生物，其心智与身体一样敏捷。它代表速度与快速通行。尽管蟋蟀通常与旅行相关联，但果实代表在旅程尽头发现的宝藏。若蟋蟀失衡，旅程将进展不顺，而宝藏将是失去而非寻得之物。
The Cricket (neutral good, Dexterity) represents a creature whose mind is as quick as its body. It represents speed and quick passage. Although The Cricket is commonly associated with travel, the fruit represents treasure found at the end of a journey. If The Cricket is misaligned, the journey will go poorly, and the treasure will be one that is lost rather than found.

The Crows.name: 乌鸦帮 The Crows
The Crows.description:
乌鸦（中立邪恶，敏捷）是一群危险的家伙，预示着以暴力夺取所珍爱之物。当乌鸦出现时，谋杀、盗窃或其他损失会发生。若此牌倒置，则此类行为可被避免，或盗窃是正当的。
The Crows (neutral evil, Dexterity) are a dangerous bunch who indicate violent taking of that which is loved. When The Crows appear, murder, theft, or other loss occurs. If the card is misaligned, such acts can be averted or the thievery is a just one.

The Cyclone.name: 气旋 The Cyclone
The Cyclone.description:
旋风（混乱邪恶，力量）是一股撕裂其所遇一切的力场。这场灾害并非自然秩序进程中出现之物，而是源自智慧生物的阴谋。旋风象征战争、纵火，或其他摧毁其所接触一切的事件。若解读不当，此牌也可能表示在狂风般的考验之后迎来新生。
The Cyclone (chaotic evil, Strength) is a force that tears through whatever it meets. This disaster does not come in the course of natural order but is one that comes from the plots of intelligent beings. The Cyclone signifies war, arson, or other events that destroy everything they touch. Misaligned, this card can indicate renewal after a blustery trial.

The Dance.name: 舞蹈 The Dance
The Dance.description:
舞步（守序善良，敏捷）是一套丰饶而精妙的体系，它如同宇宙本身一般，要求其中的每个人都遵守其规则，否则整个结构就会崩塌。它劝诫你保持完美的步调，知晓自己在强效善中所处的位置。那些踏出既定步式的人将自担风险。若步式错位，那图样或许会令人着迷，但绝非为了众人之善。
The Dance (lawful good, Dexterity) is a rich and delicate framework that, like the universe itself, requires everyone within it to abide by its rules, lest the entire construct collapse. It advises staying in perfect step, knowing your place in the greater good. Those who step out of the pattern do so at their peril. Misaligned, that pattern might be hypnotic, but not to the good of all.

The Demon's Lantern.name: 恶魔的灯笼 The Demon's Lantern
The Demon's Lantern.description:
恶魔的灯笼（混乱邪恶，敏捷）是一张象征陷阱与诡计、戏法与心智戏法的牌。发光的宝珠代表机会的世界，用来引诱人步入险境。若为逆位，恶魔的灯笼代表一个机会或一位向导在完美的时刻到来，指引道路。
The Demon’s Lantern (chaotic evil, Dexterity) is the card of traps and tricks, sleight of hand and sleight of mind. The glowing orbs represent worlds of opportunity used to lure one into peril. Misaligned, The Demon’s Lantern represents an opportunity or a guide arriving at a perfect moment to show the way.

faces.name: 恶魔的灯笼 The Demon's Lantern
faces.text:
恶魔之灯笼
The Demon's Lantern

The Desert.name: 沙漠 The Desert
The Desert.description:
沙漠（混乱善良，体质）是一种环境，荒凉到没有援助便无人能够生存。对于那些找到援助的人来说，穿越荒原的旅程可能通向伟大的成就。若为不协调，它意味着对象无法依赖他人的帮助，并将迷失。此牌上的生物可以指代来自意想不到来源的援助之源。
The Desert (chaotic good, Constitution) is an environment so bleak that none can survive without aid. For those who find aid, the journey across the wastes can lead to great things. Misaligned, it implies the subject can’t rely on the help of others and will be lost. The creature on this card can refer to a source of aid from an unexpected source.

The Eclipse.name: 《日蚀》 The Eclipse
The Eclipse.description:
日蚀（守序邪恶，感知）代表自我怀疑与目标感的丧失。此牌折磨信念，象征在巨大苦难之下，力量与信条如何会动摇。它也可能预示在道路上迷失方向。若为逆位，它可预兆某个未曾预告的能力浮现，或一个隐蔽地点被揭示。
The Eclipse (lawful evil, Wisdom) represents self-doubt and loss of purpose. This card afflicts faith, symbolizing how powers and convictions can falter under great distress. It can also indicate a loss of way along a path. If misaligned, it can augur an unheralded ability coming to the fore or a concealed location revealed.

The Empty Throne.name: 空王座 The Empty Throne
The Empty Throne.description:
空王座（守序善良，魅力）带着一种可感知的失落感。空王座象征着那些已离去之人将永远与我们同在。他们教会了我们重要的教训，只要我们愿意倾听。这张牌可以带来来自遥远或古老源头的信息。若空王座失位，过去的幽灵（特征）将不得安宁，可能需要付出努力才能使其安息。
The Empty Throne (lawful good, Charisma) has a sense of loss that is palpable. The Empty Throne signifies that those who are gone will always be with us. They taught us important lessons, if only we choose to listen. This card can bring information from a far-off or ancient source. If The Empty Throne is misaligned, the ghosts of the past are restless, and might require effort to set at peace.

The Fiend.name: 恶魔 The Fiend
The Fiend.description:
恶魔（守序邪恶，力量）描绘了一名魔鬼吞噬无辜者。它可以预示在一场巨大的灾厄中许多人的死亡；或者，如果方向相反，则预示从同一场灾害中获得救赎。恶魔也可以表示有一个阴险且聪明的生物在该区域内，危及民众。
The Fiend (lawful evil, Strength) depicts a devil swallowing innocents. It can indicate the deaths of many in a great calamity or, if misaligned, salvation from the same disaster. The Fiend can also indicate that a sinister and intelligent creature is in the area, endangering the populace.

The Fool.name: 愚者 The Fool
The Fool.description:
愚者（中立邪恶，智力）是一张象征深重愚蠢与贪婪的牌。它可能意味着贿赂、勒索，或天真到极致以至于看不见邪恶。愚者所处的境况代表着一种认知：尊严的丧失可能先于生命的丧失。若为失衡态，这张牌可能表示装作无知以伪装自己的赋礼。
The Fool (neutral evil, Intelligence) is a card of grave foolishness and greed. It can mean bribery, blackmail, or naivety so grand it can see no evil. The situation The Fool finds themselves in represents the knowledge that loss of dignity can precede loss of life. Misaligned, this card might indicate feigning of ignorance to disguise one’s gifts.

The Forge.name: 熔炉 The Forge
The Forge.description:
熔炉（守序中立，力量）通过材料与根源的多样性唤起力量。铁匠代表那些能够在超自然的火之考验中幸存的人，但熔炉的火如此强大，反而将许多人烧成灰烬。这张牌往往代表一个危险的事件，需要许多力量来源才能克服。
The Forge (lawful neutral, Strength) evokes strength through diversity of materials and traditions. The blacksmith represents those who can survive supernatural trials by fire, but The Forge’s fire is so strong it burns many to cinders instead. This card often represents a dangerous event that requires many sources of strength to overcome.

The Hidden Truth.name: 隐藏的真相 The Hidden Truth
The Hidden Truth.description:
隐秘真相（守序善良，智力）象征着看穿显而易见与平庸之处的能力，从而洞见内在的强效真相。有时这种发现是深奥的，有时则是字面意义上的发现，例如在房间内揭示出一件物品。无论如何，这是一张拥有揭示秘密之力量的牌。若为失衡，它可能意味着某个秘密被揭露，从而对当事者不利。
The Hidden Truth (lawful good, Intelligence) symbolizes the ability to see past the obvious and the banal to a greater truth within. Sometimes this discovery is an esoteric one, sometimes it is a literal find, such as an item revealed within a room. Regardless, it is a card with the power to reveal secrets. Misaligned, it can mean a secret being revealed to the subject’s detriment.

faces.name: 隐藏的真相 The Hidden Truth
faces.text:
隐藏的真相
The Hidden Truth

The Inquisitor.name: 审判官 The Inquisitor
The Inquisitor.description:
审判官（守序中立，智力）除了真相之外什么都不接受。审判官代表不可更改的现实——那种无法以任何方式被欺骗或动摇的存在。试图反抗这一不可改变的物体、人物或理念，就是在招致灾害。
The Inquisitor (lawful neutral, Intelligence) accepts nothing but truth. The Inquisitor represents immutable reality, that which can’t be fooled or swayed in any way. To attempt to go against this unchangeable object, person, or idea is to court disaster.

The Joke.name: 笑话 The Joke
The Joke.description:
笑话（混乱善良，智力）展示了一种必须被克服的恐惧——但不是通过物理手段。这种恐惧可以通过诡计或巧计被战胜。这张牌可以代表幽默在找到绕过一个难缠的人或任务之路中的价值。当失衡时，它常常预示着笑话会落在你身上。
The Joke (chaotic good, Intelligence) shows a terror that must be overcome—but not by physical means. This terror can be defeated by trickery or artifice. This card can represent the value of humor in finding the way past a difficult person or task. When misaligned, it often signals that the joke will be on you.

The Juggler.name: 杂耍者 The Juggler
The Juggler.description:
杂耍者（混乱善良，敏捷）代表命运、神祇，或那些玩弄他人生命与宿命的人。若杂耍者能保持自己的节奏，他就会达成目标。但在位置不正时，他会踉跄失误，而悲剧与失败将注定降临在那些被他干预过人生的人身上。
The Juggler (chaotic good, Dexterity) represents fate, the gods, or those who play with the lives and destinies of others. If The Juggler can keep up his rhythm, he will achieve his goals. But in a misaligned placement, he falters, and tragedy and failure are assured for those whose lives he meddled in.

The Keep.name: 要塞 The Keep
The Keep.description:
壁垒（中立善良，力量）是沉静力量的象征，这种力量能在必要时改变，却也能在最艰难的困境中坚定屹立。壁垒所代表的人不会被任何力量动摇。如果壁垒出现偏位，可能意味着向诱惑让步，或在强效力量面前坠落。
The Keep (neutral good, Strength) is a symbol of quiet strength, one that can shift when necessary, yet stand firm through the greatest hardship. Those represented by The Keep are not shaken by any force. If The Keep appears misaligned, it can mean giving way to temptation or falling in the face of greater strength.

The Liar.name: 谎言者 The Liar
The Liar.description:
骗子（混乱邪恶，魅力）是最为背叛的爱。这不是能移山的爱——这是将心撕成两半、让恋人跃向死亡的爱。骗子可能意味着痴迷、得不到回应的激情，或注定失败的爱。若为逆位，这张牌可能预示一段新关系的开始，尽管它伪装成某种远不那么美好的事物。
The Liar (chaotic evil, Charisma) is love at its most treacherous. This is not the love that moves mountains— this is the love that rips the heart in two and causes lovers to leap to their deaths. The Liar can mean obsession, unrequited passion, or doomed love. Misaligned, the card can indicate a new relationship beginning, although disguised as something much less beautiful.

The Locksmith.name: 锁匠 The Locksmith
The Locksmith.description:
开锁匠（守序中立，敏捷）向对象呈上他们所需的钥匙，以解锁其命运。他们找到了进入新地点、线索或宝藏所需的工具。此牌不会提供关于如何或在何处使用所获工具的洞见。此牌常常代表一件奇异、古老或魔法的物体。
The Locksmith (lawful neutral, Dexterity) presents the subject with the keys they need to unlock their destiny. They find the tools to access a new location, clue, or treasure. The card does not grant insight into how or where to use the tools granted. This card often represents a strange, ancient, or magical object.

The Lost.name: 失落者 The Lost
The Lost.description:
迷失者（混乱邪恶，感知）是一张象征空虚与自我认同丧失的牌。牌中所示的身影已被摧毁，迷失于噩梦的世界、折磨人的景象与杀戮者之间。对受其影响的人而言，世界毫无意义。它唤起一切皆为胡言乱语的时刻，就像遇到一个只会说另一种语言的人一样。若为反位，迷失者可表示在压力之下仍具备心智的清明。
The Lost (chaotic evil, Wisdom) is the card of emptiness and loss of identity. The figure shown is destroyed, lost in worlds of nightmares, tormented vistas, and killers. For those under its influence, the world makes no sense. It evokes times where all is babble, as when meeting someone who speaks only in another tongue. Misaligned, The Lost can indicate clarity of mind under duress.

The Marriage.name: 婚姻 The Marriage
The Marriage.description:
婚姻（守序中立，魅力）可以是人与人、理念、王国或其他不同事物的结合。其后裔寄望城一种可能从双方孕育出新的力量的结合，或是一种将本不该结合之物强行连结、从而导致毁灭的结合。一旦成婚，二者便无法分离。这是一张象征永久改变的牌。
The Marriage (lawful neutral, Charisma) can be a union of people, ideas, kingdoms, or other distinct things. The progeny promises a union that might bring forth new power from both parties, or one that might be a ruinous joining of that which should never have been united. Once wedded, the two can’t be parted. This is the card of permanent change.

The Midwife.name: 助产士 The Midwife
The Midwife.description:
助产士（中立善良，感知）是通往创造的导管，尽管助产士并不会独自创造。助产士是一把钥匙，让新的生命或信息进入世界。他们的心即使在最糟糕的处境中也能看见善意。他们能看出任何新来者的重要性，但如果这张牌不正位，新来者很可能不会带来多少喜悦。
The Midwife (neutral good, Wisdom) is a conduit to creation, although The Midwife does not create on their own. The Midwife is a key that lets new life or information into the world. Their heart can see the good in even the worst situation. They can see the import of any new arrival, but if the card is misaligned, the new arrival will likely not inspire much joy.

The Mountain Man.name: 山岳之子 The Mountain Man
The Mountain Man.description:
山中人（混乱中立，体质）象征着与一种超出自身控制的肉体力量的遭遇。山中人可能人格化为权威、军队、地震，甚至是在干旱之地迫切需要的一场暴雨。顺从这股力量或许明智，但生存下来才是最重要的。
The Mountain Man (chaotic neutral, Constitution) signifies an encounter with a physical power outside of one’s control. The Mountain Man could personify an authority, an army, an earthquake, or even a desperately needed rainstorm in a parched land. Acceding to the force might be wise, but surviving it is paramount.

The Owl.name: 猫头鹰 The Owl
The Owl.description:
猫头鹰（中立，感知）代表自然秩序的永恒智慧。它是严酷的现实主义，促使一群狼在兽群中淘汰弱者。对被淘汰的鹿而言这是悲剧，但通过这样的动作，兽群会变得更强。猫头鹰将生命联结在一起，但也同样轻易地能将那生命拆散。
The Owl (neutral, Wisdom) represents the eternal wisdom of the natural order. It is the harsh realism that causes a pack of wolves to cull the weak in the herd. It is tragic for the culled deer, but through such actions the herd grows stronger. The Owl binds life together, but just as easily can pick that life apart.

The Paladin.name: 圣武士 The Paladin
The Paladin.description:
圣武士（守序善良，力量）象征着在逆境面前坚定不屈。圣武士在任何环境下都不会退缩。这张牌通常表示需要坚持到底，或去做自己知道正确的事，即使要付出沉重代价。如果这张牌出现失位，那么这样的做法可能会是鲁莽的。
The Paladin (lawful good, Strength) symbolizes standing strong in the face of adversity. The Paladin does not back down under any circumstances. This card usually indicates the need to stay the course or do what one knows is right, even if it takes a heavy toll. If the card is misaligned, such a course might be foolhardy.

The Peacock.name: 孔雀 The Peacock
The Peacock.description:
孔雀（中立，敏捷）是一种外貌惊人而绚丽的生物，它能让旁观者在见到如此美丽或丑陋时当场僵住。更睿智的人接受时代的流逝，并舞步轻盈地避开孔雀的道路。它的出现总是预示着个人态度的突然转变或社会变革。
The Peacock (neutral, Dexterity) is a creature of astonishing and colorful appearance, one that can cause the onlooker to freeze in their tracks at the sight of such beauty or ugliness. Wiser people accept the passage of time and dance out of The Peacock’s way. Its appearance always signifies a sudden personal shift in attitude or societal change.

The Publican.name: 店主 The Publican
The Publican.description:
酒馆老板（混乱善良，感知）代表情谊与友爱，以及为有需要之人提供庇护之所。大多数人会觉得酒馆老板无足轻重，但他们拥有与占卜解读或一项任务相关的见解。若为逆位，酒馆老板代表尚未找到的庇护，或在关键时刻给出的错误信息。
The Publican (chaotic good, Wisdom) represents fellowship and camaraderie, and a place of refuge for those in need. Most would find The Publican inconsequential, but they have insights relevant to the reading or a quest. Misaligned, The Publican represents refuge yet to be found or false information given at a crucial moment.

The Queen Mother.name: 王太后 The Queen Mother
The Queen Mother.description:
王太后（守序中立，感知）是知识的化身。王太后知晓一切，但不会向那些未表现出恰当崇敬的人透露分毫。王太后偏爱无权无势者与底层阶级，因为当更强大者拒绝服侍时，唯有他们会效劳。她们代表着融入社会的必要，或在知晓比你更多的人面前俯首称臣。
The Queen Mother (lawful neutral, Wisdom) is knowledge personified. The Queen Mother knows all but reveals nothing to those who do not show proper worship. The Queen Mother is fond of the powerless and the underclasses, for they serve when the more powerful refuse. They represent the need to become part of a society, or to bow before those who know more than you.

The Rabbit Prince.name: 兔子王子 The Rabbit Prince
The Rabbit Prince.description:
兔子王子（混乱中立，敏捷）是个古怪的家伙，代表徒手战斗的变幻莫测。兔子王子是战斗的化身，若非反复无常便不成其为他。正如他那把破损的武器所象征的那样，无论多么勇敢或娴熟，任何战斗者都可能在战斗中倒下。这张牌有时也代表皇室的年轻成员或其他强大家族的成员。
The Rabbit Prince (chaotic neutral, Dexterity) is a quirky fellow who represents the vagaries of hand-to-hand combat. The Rabbit Prince is battle personified and nothing if not capricious. As his broken weapon symbolizes, any combatant can fall in battle, no matter how brave or skilled. This card sometimes stands for younger members of royalty or other powerful households.

The Rakshasa.name: 罗刹（特征） The Rakshasa
The Rakshasa.description:
罗刹（特征）（守序邪恶，智力）是支配与心智控制之牌。站在雕像前的生物表明，一股外在的力场正将自身强加于另一个对象之上。有时，这种强加是字面意义上的，但更多时候是心智上的支配。若为逆位，此牌意味着在新的信息面前，这种控制可以被摆脱。
The Rakshasa (lawful evil, Intelligence) is the card of dominance and mind control. The creature standing before a statue indicates an exterior force imposing itself upon another. On occasion, this imposition is literal, but more often it is mental domination. Misaligned, this card means that the control can be cast off in the face of new information.

The Sickness.name: 疾病 The Sickness
The Sickness.description:
疾病（中立邪恶，体质）代表瘟疫、疫病、饥荒与疾病。它也可以表示灵魂的腐化。若解读不当，疾病要么代表极佳的健康，要么代表阻止此类灾害的机会。
The Sickness (neutral evil, Constitution) represents plague, pestilence, famine, and disease. It can also indicate corruption of the soul. If misaligned, The Sickness represents either great health or a chance to stop such a disaster.

The Silent Hag.name: 沉默鬼婆（特征） The Silent Hag
The Silent Hag.description:
沉默的鬼婆（中立邪恶，感知）也许沉默，但仍能洞悉它所遇之人的内心。沉默的鬼婆唤起血之契约与致命的秘密——那种会让兄弟反目、让子女对抗父母的秘密。它是一张表演者憎恶的牌，因为它会让他们在言语与歌唱中踉跄失措。倒置时，它表示不可动摇的忠诚与言语的清晰。
The Silent Hag (neutral evil, Wisdom) might be silent, but still sees into the hearts of those they meet. The Silent Hag invokes blood pacts and poisonous secrets, the kind that turn sibling against sibling and child against parent. It is a card that performers loathe, as it leaves them stumbling over their words and songs. Misaligned, it indicates unshakable loyalty and lucidity of speech.

faces.name: 沉默鬼婆（特征） The Silent Hag
faces.text:
沉默的鬼婆（特征）
The Silent Hag

The Snakebite.name: 蛇咬 The Snakebite
The Snakebite.description:
蛇咬（混乱邪恶，智力）是一把卑劣、淬毒的武器。毒素有许多形态——并非全都具备实体。蛇咬代表思想与自由的死亡，也代表让朋友彼此反目或毒害善良之人心智的能力。若解读为不符位，这张牌可能意味着一次心智上的飞跃、一段新友谊，或一项发现。
The Snakebite (chaotic evil, Intelligence) is a vile, poisoned weapon. Poison takes many forms—not all of them physical. The Snakebite represents the death of ideas and freedom, as well as the ability to turn friends against each other or poison the minds of the virtuous. Misaligned, this card can mean a mental leap, a new friendship, or a discovery.

The Survivor.name: 幸存者 The Survivor
The Survivor.description:
幸存者（中立善良，体质）代表一个经历过某种磨难的人。被他倒下的同伴所环绕，这个形象代表某个或某种曾被认为永远失落之物，却再次被找回。它也可以代表重生。若正位不符，幸存者可能唤起可怕的消息或深重的失去。
The Survivor (neutral good, Constitution) represents a person who has been through an ordeal of some kind. Surrounded by his fallen comrades, the figure represents someone or something thought lost forever, but found once more. It can also represent rebirth. Misaligned, The Survivor can evoke terrible news or a profound loss.

The Tangled Briar.name: 纠缠的荆棘 The Tangled Briar
The Tangled Briar.description:
纠缠荆棘（守序邪恶，体质）是一张关于古老功业的卡牌。它表明某个久远以前的物体或人物将以某种方式对局势产生重大影响。所指的物体或人物是以某种卑劣方式遗失或被谋杀的。若为逆位，多刺的过去带来的不仅是痛苦，还有对未来的希望。
The Tangled Briar (lawful evil, Constitution) is a card of ancient deeds. It indicates an object or person from long ago that will somehow have great influence on the situation. The object or person in question is one lost or murdered in some foul way. Misaligned, the thorny past brings not just pain, but hope for the future.

faces.name: 纠缠荆棘 The Tangled Briar
faces.text:
纠缠荆棘
The Tangled Briar

The Teamster.name: 车队夫 The Teamster
The Teamster.description:
赶车人（中立，体质）是一种驱动性的外在力场，无论发生什么都会让目标继续前进。这股力场可以是肉体或精神层面的，例如某人激励他人在已经没有更多力量可付出时仍继续前行。这股力场可以为善也可以为恶，但无法被忽视。画面中较大的那个人物正过着持续劳作的生命，但这是为了自身的提升。
The Teamster (neutral, Constitution) is a driving external force that keeps the subject going, no matter what. This force can be physical or mental, as a person who exhorts others to continue on when they have no more strength to give. The force can be for good or ill but can’t be ignored. The larger figure depicted is leading a life of constant toil, but for their own betterment.

The Theater.name: 剧院 The Theater
The Theater.description:
剧院（中立善良，魅力）代表“生命的阶段”。木偶表演一幕场景，正如先知表演一幕与她无关的场景。先知是观众，而他们的预言就是演出。他们对所见之事没有影响，而其重要性往往直到为时已晚才被认识到。若剧院失衡，这个故事就只是作秀。
The Theater (neutral good, Charisma) represents the “stage that is life.” The puppets act out a scene, just as the prophet acts out a scene in which she has no part. The prophet is the audience and their predictions are the show. They have no influence on what they see, and its importance is often not recognized until too late. If The Theater is misaligned, the story is just for show.

The Trader.name: 商人 The Trader
The Trader.description:
商人（中立，智力）是间谍与小贩皆适用的一张牌。任何交易情报者都会受到此牌的影响。在此牌的庇佑下达成的交易总会如约兑现，但对于不理解其含义的人而言，契约的后果可能令人震惊。
The Trader (neutral, Intelligence) is the card of spies and peddlers alike. Any who trade in information are subject to this card’s influence. A bargain made under this card’s auspice always concludes true, but the ramifications of the pact might be shocking for those who do not understand its implications.

The Trumpet.name: 号角 The Trumpet
The Trumpet.description:
号角（守序善良，体质）是一种力量的宣言。这张牌展示了一位咄咄逼人的力量，为了正义毫不犹豫地涉入最危急的局势。若不协调，它暗示动机并不高尚，带来伤害与崩塌的力量。这是一张要么赐予一切、要么毫无所予的牌。
The Trumpet (lawful good, Constitution) is a declaration of power. This card shows an aggressive force who wades into the direst situations without hesitation in the cause of right. Misaligned, it suggests the motives aren’t noble, bringing injury and crumbling strength. It is a card that grants all or nothing at all.

The Twin.name: 双子 The Twin
The Twin.description:
双子（中立，魅力）象征目的或身份的二元性，既可以代表肉体上的复制体，也同样可以代表精神或心智层面的复制。这张牌也可能意味着优柔寡断，因为某个人或团体在截然不同的选项之间摇摆不定。它也可能表示分裂的忠诚随处可见。这张牌会让占卜者心生警惕，因为它还可能意味着整副牌阵具有隐藏或反转的含义。
The Twin (neutral, Charisma) signals duality of purpose or identity, and can just as easily represent physical duplicates as much as spiritual or mental ones. This figure can also mean indecision, as a person or group wavers between very different options. It can also mean divided loyalties abound. The card makes a harrower wary, as it can also mean the entire spread has a hidden or reversed meaning.

The Tyrant.name: 暴君 The Tyrant
The Tyrant.description:
暴君（守序邪恶，魅力）象征一位统治者，对被统治者而言如同祸害，或其掌控对本应照料的人而言是有毒的。巨龙可能象征君主、监管者或一家之主。无论此人是谁，他们都会伤害那些受其支配的人，无论他们是否意识到这一点。逆位时，这张牌可能象征暴君被揭露或被推翻。
The Tyrant (lawful evil, Charisma) indicates a ruler who is a blight upon those ruled, or someone whose control is toxic to those they should be caring for. The dragon might indicate a monarch, overseer, or head of a household. Whoever this person is, they do harm to those over whom they hold sway, whether they realize it or not. Misaligned, this card might indicate a tyrant revealed or dethroned.

The Unicorn.name: 独角兽 The Unicorn
The Unicorn.description:
独角兽（混乱善良，魅力）是一张慷慨地给予受试者所寻之物的牌，例如来自同样意想不到的来源的一份意外的赋礼。当失谐时，这张牌意味着背叛、下毒，或一位虚假的朋友。
The Unicorn (chaotic good, Charisma) is a card that generously offers that which the subject seeks, such as an unexpected gift from an equally unexpected source. When misaligned, the card means betrayal, poisoning, or a false friend.

The Uprising.name: 起义 The Uprising
The Uprising.description:
起义（混乱中立，力量）代表你被某种比你更强大的事物所攫住。那是一股压倒性的力量，会碾碎与之接触的一切。王冠象征着推翻某种形式的领袖。在牌阵中，它表示一股远比接受解读之人更强的力场。10
The Uprising (chaotic neutral, Strength) represents being caught in the clutches of something more powerful than you. It is an overwhelming strength that crushes what comes in contact with it. The crown signifies an overthrowing of a leader of some sort. In the spread, it indicates a force much stronger than the person receiving the reading.10

The Vision.name: 视野 The Vision
The Vision.description:
视野（混乱中立，智力）代表晦涩或超自然的学识。这类知识可以呈现为幻象或隐晦的言语。这张牌通常意味着一次与高深莫测之人的遭遇，但也可能象征与天才的短暂接触。
The Vision (chaotic neutral, Intelligence) represents obscure or supernatural lore. Such knowledge can take the form of visions or cryptic words. This card often means an encounter with an inscrutable person, but it can also signify a brush with genius.

The Wanderer.name: 漫游者 The Wanderer
The Wanderer.description:
漫游者（中立善良，智力）展现出收藏家的随身物品。漫游者欣赏那些被他人视为破烂或垃圾的东西。漫游者会显现给那些足够聪明、能在他人忽视或视为毫无价值之物中发现真正价值的人。若不合调，漫游者象征价值观的丧失，或无法看见某个人或某种处境中真正有价值之处。
The Wanderer (neutral good, Intelligence) shows the belongings of a collector. The Wanderer appreciates that which others regard as junk or trash. The Wanderer appears to those clever enough to find the true worth in something others ignore or treat as worthless. Misaligned, The Wanderer signifies a loss of values, or the inability to see what is truly valuable in a person or situation.

The Waxworks.name: 蜡像馆 The Waxworks
The Waxworks.description:
蜡像馆（混乱邪恶，体质）是一个无助与肉体熵的所在。心智也许愿意，但血肉在这恐怖之地被冻结。它也是酷刑与囚禁之牌，象征字面上无法移动，或一种更为平常的麻痹。逆位时，这张牌表示在关键时刻能量过剩，从而改变一切。
The Waxworks (chaotic evil, Constitution) is a place of helplessness and physical entropy. The mind might be willing, but the flesh is frozen in this place of horror. It is also the card of torture and imprisonment, signifying literal inability to move or a paralysis of a more prosaic kind. Misaligned, this card indicates an abundance of energy at a crucial moment that changes all.

The Winged Serpent.name: 翼蛇 The Winged Serpent
The Winged Serpent.description:
有翼巨蛇（守序善良，感知）是一个强大的存在。知识与审慎是彼此分离的堡垒，而理解在其间架起桥梁。有翼巨蛇代表这座桥，懂得是否当下就是时代去打击。若方向不正，这张牌意味着要么未能把握时机，要么是在欠缺明智的情况下贸然为之。
The Winged Serpent (lawful good, Wisdom) is a powerful being. Knowledge and prudence are separate keeps bridged by understanding. The Winged Serpent represents this bridge, knowing whether now is the time to strike. Misaligned, this card means either not seizing a moment or doing so ill-advisedly.
